scenes.description: Ouro Kronii performs "Life Will Change" on a digital city-themed stage.
Instrumental transition showing stage graphics and digital city visuals.

subtitles.original: 飛べない 此処からじゃ
subtitles.english: I can't fly from here

subtitles.original: 横顔 眺めているだけじゃ
subtitles.english: If I'm just staring at your profile

subtitles.original: 無力さ 嘆いても
subtitles.english: Even if I lament my helplessness

subtitles.original: この背を 誰も押さない
subtitles.english: No one will push me forward

subtitles.original: Going out
subtitles.english: Going out

subtitles.original: 飛び方を忘れていた
subtitles.english: I'd forgotten how to fly

subtitles.original: 雛鳥たちの嘆きのVoice
subtitles.english: The voice of the chicks' lamentations

subtitles.original: 凍てつく無機質な世界に何を望むの？
subtitles.english: What do you hope for in this frozen, inorganic world?

subtitles.original: そうだよね 確実な希望が僕の中に
subtitles.english: That's right, a certain hope is inside of me

subtitles.original: Going out
subtitles.english: Going out

subtitles.original: 何ができるかなんてのはやってみなきゃわからない
subtitles.english: You won't know what you can do until you try

subtitles.original: 走り出した 始まりへ
subtitles.english: I've started running toward the beginning

subtitles.original: きっと 生まれる前から決まっていた
subtitles.english: It was surely decided before I was born

subtitles.original: 羽を揺らし 強く地面を蹴って
subtitles.english: Flapping my wings and kicking off the ground

subtitles.original: 君の元へ 羽ばたけ
subtitles.english: I'll fly to you

subtitles.original: Ravens, spiraling, holding on
subtitles.english: Ravens, spiraling, holding on

subtitles.original: 螺旋のルートの中で会う
subtitles.english: Meeting within the spiral route

subtitles.original: この場所でもう止められない
subtitles.english: I can't be stopped in this place anymore

subtitles.original: カルマの真下で僕にできることが
subtitles.english: What I can do right beneath karma

subtitles.original: どんなに僅かでも
subtitles.english: No matter how little it is

subtitles.original: その身体に背負うもの その痛み 分け合える日まで
subtitles.english: The things you carry on that body, until the day we can share that pain

subtitles.original: 君のそばにいる
subtitles.english: I will be by your side
